final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey), reimagined in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: 90s Hong Kong cinema poster aesthetic, film grain texture
Composition: central embrace with supporting figures in background, classic HK poster layout
Subject: 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in an embrace on the city wall, 牛魔王 standing in the distance, 唐僧 standing nearby
Scene/backdrop: ancient city wall at dusk, distant silhouette of 牛魔王 and 唐僧 visible in the background
Lighting/mood: romantic golden hour with dramatic shadows, nostalgic 90s Hong Kong film atmosphere
Color palette: warm golden tones with deep reds and muted earth tones, vintage film color grading
Materials/textures: 35mm film grain, slightly faded print texture, matte paper finish
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: must evoke 90s Hong Kong wuxia romance poster conventions, film grain must be visible
Avoid: modern digital polish, overly saturated colors, contemporary minimalist design
